response.justification: Bogdan is a genuinely strong staff-level generalist with nearly two decades of shipping across web, embedded, and high-throughput distributed systems, a CS degree from ETH Zürich, and current hands-on work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure. However, the role demands 8+ years building production AI solutions, and his GenAI experience spans roughly one year; the resume shows no vector database, RAG, or LLM evaluation/observability work, and Python is absent from his skill set. He could grow into the role, but he does not meet the core required qualifications today.
strengths: Current hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow tooling experience at re:cinq
Deep, versatile engineering background including low-latency systems handling millions of requests per second
Strong TypeScript/Node expertise plus cloud exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and a proven mentoring/teaching track record
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building production AI solutions (~1 year of GenAI work)
No demonstrated vector database, RAG architecture, or LLM evaluation pipeline experience
Python is not listed among his skills, and enterprise customer-facing delivery experience is thin
